case_title: AFFILIATED PRODUCERS INC. VS O K MIKE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY AFFILIATED PRODUCERS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT O K MIKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT OK MIKE RETURNED SIGNED.
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED. CONT. REQUEST FILED, NO MONEY SUBMITTED, WILL BE TREATED WITH THE CHALLENGE OF VENUE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-05-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AFFILIATED PRODUCERS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O K MIKE $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT O K MIKE HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-01-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-14-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT O K MIKE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
